articles.author: Melissa Ait Lounis
articles.title: Europe and China Are Launching a New Spacecraft That Will Fly 121,000 Kilometers Above Earth to Study Solar Storms - The Daily Galaxy
articles.description: Scientists are preparing to launch a spacecraft designed to observe violent solar activity from a completely new perspective.
articles.content: A joint European and Chinese spacecraft is set to launch Tuesday to examine what happens when powerful solar storms strike Earths magnetic field. The mission, known as SMILE, will make the first X-ra… [+3617 chars]
